novel_features.name: Cross-project secret-name audit
novel_features.description: Find every project (across orgs) holding a secret with a given name, plus when each was last synced.

novel_features.name: Function inventory rollup
novel_features.description: Per-project, per-org rollup of every edge function with slug, version, status, and last-deployed timestamp.

novel_features.name: Branch-drift sweep
novel_features.description: List preview branches older than N days that haven't been merged or deleted, grouped by parent project.

novel_features.name: Auth user lookup with context
novel_features.description: Look up an Auth user by email and optionally join their row from a user-named PostgREST context table on user_id.

novel_features.name: RLS-aware schema introspection
novel_features.description: Fetch the per-project PostgREST OpenAPI from the Management API and list tables, columns, types, and detected indexes for typed query planning.

novel_features.name: Project estate rollup
novel_features.description: One-row-per-project rollup of function count, branch count, api-key count, secret-name count, and last-synced-at.

novel_features.name: Storage bucket usage rollup
novel_features.description: For each bucket, list objects and aggregate file count, total bytes, and largest object.

novel_features.name: Cross-project recent signups
novel_features.description: Iterate synced projects, call Auth Admin per project, aggregate users created within the window into one table.
